name: PE Binary Analyzer
description: Static triage of Windows PE binaries (EXE/DLL) with pefile: machine/arch, subsystem, entry/imagebase, sections + per-section entropy (packing) and RWX flags, imports classified by capability (inject/exec/network/anti-debug/persist/crypto), exports, TLS callbacks, overlay, and Authenticode presence. Emits BINARY.* atoms. Reads structure only — never runs the binary.

prerequisites.install_hint: Install Python 3.8+. pefile is vendored (pure-python), so no network/install at analysis time.

safety.notes: Static structural parse (pefile). Never loads, maps, or executes the binary.

payload.note: Vendored via `uv pip install --target runtime/site` (pure-python, portable). Companion to elf-analyze / hex-view; emits BINARY.* atoms that map onto an MCD reading.
